name: GitCortex
description: GitCortex is an AI-driven multi-terminal task orchestration platform that enables multiple AI coding agents (such as Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex) to collaborate in parallel on complex software development tasks.
summaryZh: GitCortex is an AI-driven multi-terminal task orchestration platform that enables multiple AI coding agents (such as Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Codex) to collaborate in parallel on complex software development tasks. 这是一类偏执行和编排的 AI 项目，适合拿来搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
